topics: Overview of Computational Methods in Biomedical Engineering
Basic Programming Skills (Python/MATLAB): Variables and Operations
Conditional Statements (if, elif, else) and Loops (for, while)
Libraries for Numerical Computing and Data Analysis
Root Finding Methods (Bisection, Newton-Raphson), Solving Linear and Nonlinear Equations, Applications in Biomedical Engineering
Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) and Their Applications
Modeling of Biological Processes (Neuronal Dynamics, Cell Electrophysiology)
Partial Differential Equations (PDEs): Describing Spatial and Temporal Variations in Phenomena such as Heat Transfer in Tissues and Fluid Flow in Blood Vessels
Sequence Analysis: Algorithms for DNA, RNA, and Protein Sequence Alignment
Structural Bioinformatics: Molecular Modeling and Simulation Techniques for Studying Protein Structures and Interactions
Genomics and Proteomics: Computational Tools for Analyzing Genomic and Proteomic Data to Understand Gene Expression and Protein Functions
